series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of an Application For Drivers License and any supporting documentation needed for the issuance of an original, renewal, duplicate, temporary, upgrade, down grade, add endorsement, or commerical drivers license in accordance with section 4506.06, 4507.06, and 4507.21 of the ORC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: At time application is made obtain a drivers license, information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained a period of eight (8) years, and ; Microform: Applications issued a temporary instruction permit prior implementation of Print On Demand (POD) shall be retained a period of seven (7) years ; Paper: paper records that are not microfilmed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
